news.headline: Farmer Mac reports full year results for 2024 with outstanding business volume of $29.5 billion and a 7% dividend increase.
news.summary: Farmer Mac, a secondary market provider for American agriculture, reported its fiscal quarter and year-end results for 2024, highlighting a 7% dividend increase and an outstanding business volume of $29.5 billion. Key financials include a 8% increase in net interest income to $353.9 million, core earnings of $171.6 million, and a 7% increase in quarterly dividend to $1.50 per share. The company's total core capital was $1.5 billion with a Tier 1 Capital Ratio of 14.2% as of December 31, 2024. Farmer Mac's Board of Directors also declared dividends for preferred stocks. The company aims to strengthen rural America by providing vital liquidity to the agriculture sector. You can find the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: SECURE reported $490 million Adjusted EBITDA in 2024. Repurchased $657 million common shares reducing shares by 19%. Expects $510-$540 million Adjusted EBITDA in 2025. About SECURE: a waste management and energy infrastructure company located in Calgary, AB.
news.summary: Secure Waste Infrastructure Corp reported its financial results for Q4 2024 and the full year. In the fourth quarter, they achieved $117 million Adjusted EBITDA, repurchased $657 million worth of common shares, and had a revenue of $332 million. For the year, they reported $490 million Adjusted EBITDA, generated $1,403 million in revenue, and repurchased $657 million in shares. They plan to maintain a growth trajectory with a 2025 Adjusted EBITDA guidance of $510-540 million. The company also aims to deliver enhanced shareholder returns through buybacks and dividends. Through strategic investments and acquisitions, they aim to transform waste into value for customers and drive sustainable returns.

news.headline: Two education support worker groups in Alberta serve strike notice, totaling 870 staff from two divisions. Job action on Monday.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, more education support workers are set to go on strike as two additional groups have issued a 72-hour notice. This brings the total number of groups taking action on Monday to four. CUPE Local 3484, which represents 570 support personnel at Black Gold School Division, and CUPE Local 5040, representing 300 support staff at Foothills School Division, have both given strike notice recently. Job action is anticipated to start on Monday morning by both groups. Previously, CUPE Local 40, representing 800 employees at Calgary Board of Education, had also announced plans to strike.

news.headline: TGS Board Member buys 7,000 shares at NOK 110.3 each.
news.summary: In Oslo, Norway, on February 21, 2025, Luis Araujo, a Board Member of TGS, bought 7,000 shares of TGS ASA at a cost of NOK 110.3 per share.

news.headline: Roland Gonzalez appointed as the new CEO of Church’s Texas Chicken® to lead global growth phase. He succeeds Joe Guith.
news.summary: Church’s Texas Chicken® has appointed Roland Gonzalez as the new Chief Executive Officer, as announced in Atlanta. Gonzalez, with extensive experience in the global quick-service restaurant sector, will now helm one of the world’s biggest quick-service chicken restaurant chains. Previously serving as the Chief Operations Officer, he has contributed significantly to the brand’s recent transformation. This move follows the tenure of Joe Guith, who held the CEO position for the past two years. Church’s Texas Chicken® is gearing up for enhanced global expansion and development under Gonzalez’s leadership.

news.headline: Detroit City Distillery hosts Pączki Day party on March 1. Longest Shot Ski across a city block. Food & cocktails for sale. Bottled PDV cocktails launched on Feb 21. Crowd from across Midwest and Canada expected.  #Detroit #PączkiDay
news.summary: The record-breaking Shot Ski event in Detroit, which will stretch across an impressive city block, is set to make a comeback. Attendees can enjoy a variety of food options, including popular Polish dishes. Additionally, PDV cocktails and the usual lineup of spirits from DCD will be available for purchase. The sale of DCD's bottled PDV cocktails kicks off today in Detroit. This exciting event will take place on Feb. 21, 2025, offering a unique experience for attendees.

news.summary: On February 21, 2025, Secret Network Foundation and Aethir announced a partnership to boost AI innovation using privacy-preserving and decentralized cloud computing solutions. This collaboration will empower AI developers with access to Secret Network's cutting-edge technology.

news.headline: Tips for maximizing personal injury claims in Baltimore by attorney Steven H. Heisler. Vital legal option for those injured. Feb. 21, 2025.
news.summary: In Baltimore on February 21, 2025, it was highlighted that maximizing a personal injury claim may not be straightforward. Personal injury claims serve as crucial legal remedies for individuals who have been harmed due to someone else's negligence or misconduct. These claims provide the opportunity for victims to recoup financial losses and seek justice. It is essential to understand the complexities involved in such cases to ensure that individuals receive proper compensation for their injuries.

news.headline: Benjamin Lerner, recovering addict turned musician, releases EP "RUN TOWARDS THE TRUTH", expanding his advocacy campaign.
news.summary: In East Arlington, Vermont on February 21, 2025, the independent record label Old Mill Road Recording is excited to introduce "RUN TOWARDS THE TRUTH," the latest EP by multi-talented artist Benjamin Lerner. Lerner, a Vermont native, is known for his work as a recording artist, recovery advocate, writer, radio host, and social media influencer. The EP features a collection of tracks that showcase Lerner's unique talent and creativity, offering a fresh perspective on the music scene.

news.summary: A recent report indicates a significant increase in the unemployment rate in the United States, rising from 3.9% to 5.2%. Additionally, the number of jobless individuals seeking unemployment benefits has also risen, reaching a total of 15,000 claims. This data reveals the ongoing challenges faced by the labor market amidst the current economic conditions.

news.headline: Onex announces Q4 and full year 2024 results: positive performance and growth.
TREMFYA® shows promising results in Phase 3 ASTRO study for ulcerative colitis patients, meeting all endpoints at Week 12.
news.summary: Results from the Phase 3 ASTRO study reveal that at Week 12, all primary and secondary endpoints were successfully achieved in patients with ulcerative colitis. This study marks the sole subcutaneous induction data available for an IL-23 inhibitor, demonstrating statistically significant and clinically relevant enhancements in various clinical and endoscopic assessments when compared to a placebo.

news.headline: Oil States International, Inc. reported Q4 2024 revenues of $164.6k, with net income of $15.2k, a 154% YoY increase. Operating income was $18.5k.
news.summary: Oil States International, Inc. (NYSE: OIS) based in Houston, reported its financial results for the three months ended December 31, 2024. Consolidated revenues were $164,595 thousand, a 6% decrease from $174,348 thousand in the previous quarter and a 21% decrease from $208,266 thousand in the same period last year. Operating income for the quarter was $18,484 thousand, compared to a loss of $11,041 thousand in the prior quarter, marking a significant improvement of 136% year-over-year. Net income for the period was $15,164 thousand, in contrast to a loss of $14,349 thousand in the previous quarter, reflecting a notable increase of 154% from the same quarter last year.

news.headline: EnviroGold Global raises $3.68M in private placement, settles Convertible Notes of $3.02M, strengthening balance sheet.
news.summary: EnviroGold Global Limited, a clean technology company focused on monetizing mine waste and reducing environmental liabilities, recently completed the first part of its private placement, raising $3.68 million. The funds were used to fully repay Convertible Notes amounting to $3.02 million. This move has bolstered the company's balance sheet and positioned it better for upcoming growth opportunities.

news.summary: In Toronto on Feb. 21, 2025, Emerita Resources Corp. (listed as TSX-V: EMO; OTCQB: EMOTF; FSE: LLJA) received acknowledgement on the 2025 TSX Venture 50 as one of the leading companies. Throughout 2024, Emerita demonstrated operational expertise at its Iberian Belt West and Nuevo Tintillo projects, maintained its dedication to community involvement in Spain, and advanced shareholder value.

news.headline: Balchem Corp announces its Q4 and full year 2024 financial performance with positive numbers.
Efforts underway to prevent measles outbreaks in Texas and New Mexico; urgent race against time.
Alt season has begun, says CryptoQuant CEO with 2.7x higher alt volume than BTC, highlighting stablecoin liquidity's role.
news.summary: The CEO of CryptoQuant, Ki Young Ju, has confirmed the commencement of the altcoin season. Ju highlighted a significant change in market behavior compared to previous cycles. In a recent post, Ju expressed that alt season has started, with stablecoin holders showing a preference for altcoins. The trading volume for altcoins is reported to be 2.7 times higher than that of Bitcoin. Unlike before, where Bitcoin dominance determined capital movement towards alternative cryptocurrencies, Ju indicates that trading volume has now taken precedence as the key metric. This shift emphasizes the growing influence of stablecoin liquidity in propelling altcoin markets, rather than the traditional capital rotation from Bitcoin. According to Ju, this change showcases Bitcoin's evolving role within the crypto ecosystem.

news.headline: Endeavour Silver finds high-grade silver-gold mineralization at Bolañitos Mine in Mexico, boosts resources and extends mine life.
news.summary: Endeavour Silver Corp. has shared encouraging findings from its exploration efforts at the Bolañitos Mine in Guanajuato State, Mexico. The program for 2024/2025 concentrated on drilling the La Luz vein, yielding favorable results. The surface drilling revealed high-grade gold and silver mineral deposits, offering potential for reserve replenishment, resource expansion, and extension of the mine's operational lifespan. This update was provided by the Company based in Vancouver, British Columbia on February 21, 2025. The stocks for Endeavour Silver Corp. are listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange (EDR) and the New York Stock Exchange (EXK).

news.headline: Vipshop Q4 sales reach $4.55B, down 4.2% YoY but beat expectations. CEO notes apparel growth and discounted offerings. Q1 revenue decline expected up to 5%.
news.summary: Vipshop Holdings (NYSE: VIPS) announced fourth-quarter sales of $4.55 billion (33.2 billion Chinese Yuan), reflecting a 4.2% decline from the previous year. This surpassed the Wall Street expectation of $4.42 billion. The Chinese branded retailer reported adjusted earnings per ADS of 78 cents, exceeding the analyst consensus of 72 cents. Following the report, the stock price experienced a notable increase. In terms of order volume, total orders for the quarter stood at 217.5 million, a decrease from 234.3 million in the same period last year. For further details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Europe Military Free Space Optics Comm Market to grow at 16.27% from US$245.32 Mn in 2024 to US$1,297.51 Mn by 2035. Drive by defense demand and tech advancements. Major players like Nokia and Mynaric expanding in the market.
news.summary: The Europe Military Free Space Optics Communication industry was valued at US$ 245.32 million in 2024 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 16.27% from 2025 to 2035, reaching approximately US$ 1,297.51 million by 2035. This growth is fueled by the increasing demand for secure, high-speed communication systems in defense applications, technological advancements in optics, and the need for robust communication networks in challenging environments. Free Space Optics (FSO) communication channels are used in various applications like military communications, WAN bridging, and outdoor wireless access. The market growth is driven by the increasing need for high bandwidth, lower infrastructure costs, rapid broadband deployment, and enhanced connectivity. Major players in this market include Nokia, Mynaric AG, Cailabs, and Honeywell International Inc. Recent developments include Nokia's acquisition of Infinera and Mynaric AG's partnerships with European defense entities.

news.headline: FOREX.com, part of StoneX, to debut at Invest Cuffs conference in Krakow on March 28-29, 2025 as Chillout Zone Partner.

news.headline: ElevenLabs, Star Sports team up for AI translations in cricket broadcasts, benefiting millions of Indian fans.
news.summary: A partnership has been formed between ElevenLabs and Star Sports to introduce AI-powered instant translations of cricket commentary in various Indian languages. This initiative aims to make cricket commentary more accessible to a large number of fans.

Atmus Filtration Technologies reports Q4 net sales of $407M, full year at $1.67B. GAAP net income for Q4 at $40M, full year $186M.
news.summary: Atmus Filtration Technologies Inc., a prominent player in filtration and media solutions, announced its financial performance for the quarter and full year ending December 31, 2024. The company reported robust figures, including net sales totaling $407 million for the fourth quarter and $1,670 million for the entire year. Additionally, GAAP net income stood at $40 million for the quarter and $186 million for the year. Diluted earnings per share were reported at $0.48 for the quarter.

news.headline: AMD stock hits year-plus low due to slow PC, server sales and Nvidia's lead in AI. Unsure if it's a buy.
news.summary: AMD's stock is facing a decline due to slow PC and traditional server sales. Additionally, the company is struggling to compete with Nvidia in AI accelerators. With its stock hitting a year-plus low, investors are wondering if AMD is a good buy opportunity.

news.headline: US stock futures flat, S&P 500 slightly below, Alibaba up 14.56%, gold near $3000/ounce. Treasury yield 10yr 4.49%, 2yr 4.26%. Fed likely to keep rates unchanged.Indices mixed w/ Nasdaq +0.08%, Dow +0.09%. SPY $610.68, QQQ $537.88. Walmart shares plunged 6.53%. Jobless claims rose, Phila Fed index declined. Market analyst advises against selling due to volatility.
news.summary: U.S. stock futures were relatively flat on Friday following a decline the previous day, with the S&P 500 futures trading slightly below the flatline. Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. (NASDAQ:BABA) shares surged by 14.56% in Hong Kong after surpassing street expectations. Gold prices approached $3000 per ounce due to statements from President Donald Trump and Elon Musk regarding an inspection of bullion reserves at Fort Knox. The 10-year Treasury yield was at 4.49%, and the two-year yield stood at 4.26%. The CME Group's FedWatch tool indicated a 97.5% probability of the Federal Reserve maintaining interest rates at the March meeting. The SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (NYSE:SPY) and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF (NASDAQ:QQQ) saw fluctuations in premarket trading. Sectors like financials and consumer discretionary suffered losses on Thursday while energy and real estate saw gains. Jobless claims for the week ending Feb. 15 rose to 219,000, and the Philadelphia Fed Manufacturing Index dropped sharply to 18.1. Walmart Inc. (NASDAQ:WMT) shares fell by 6.53% despite beating expectations due to a conservative growth forecast. The Nasdaq Composite lost 0.47%, the S&P 500 dropped 0.43%, Dow Jones declined by 1.01%, and Russell 2000 fell by 0.91%. Analysts advised against making hasty financial decisions during periods of volatility.

news.headline: NVIDIA boosts Riva ASR with Whisper and Canary models, adding multilingual features for speech translation.
news.summary: NVIDIA has upgraded its Riva ASR technology by incorporating new multilingual capabilities through the Whisper and Canary models. These enhancements bring advanced features for both offline and automatic speech translation. The incorporation of these new models greatly improves the overall functionality of Riva ASR, making it more versatile and efficient for users.

news.headline: Ethereum devs in ACDC Call#151 discuss Pectra & PeerDAS upgrades, focusing on client readiness & EIP finalizations.
news.summary: During the All Core Developers Consensus Call #151, Ethereum developers concentrated on implementing upgrades for Pectra and PeerDAS. The discussions primarily revolved around client readiness and finalizing various proposals known as EIPs. This meeting indicates a significant push towards enhancing the Ethereum network's functionalities.

news.headline: TXNM Energy reports 2024 earnings of $2.67 per diluted share, increases investment plan and targets earnings growth for 2025. Ongoing earnings projected at $2.74 - $2.84 per diluted share.
news.summary: In the year 2024, the company reported GAAP earnings of $2.67 for each diluted share, while ongoing earnings stood at $2.74 per diluted share, meeting the anticipated guidance. Looking forward to 2025, the company has introduced a new ongoing earnings guidance range of $2.74 to $2.84 per diluted share. This update reflects the robust growth in Texas and the planned mid-year implementation of the PNM customer rate phase-in.
